method: 64-dimensional per-pixel embeddings fuse optical, radar, LiDAR and climate. Year-over-year embedding shift over an area = physical change on the ground. Each economic site below maps to SET tickers; the change magnitude is a leading, satellite-derived activity signal — alt-data that precedes the financial print.

aois.name: Suvarnabhumi Airport
aois.measures: Apron / parking / terminal built-up activity → passenger-throughput proxy

aois.name: Phuket beaches & hotels
aois.measures: Nightlights + built-up density → tourist occupancy proxy

aois.name: Map Ta Phut petrochem estate
aois.measures: Industrial built-up + thermal activity → refinery / petrochem run-rate

aois.name: EEC industrial estates
aois.measures: Land conversion → new factory / warehouse buildout (FDI inflow)

aois.name: Central rice plains
aois.measures: Crop vigour + planted area → food/feed supply & price pressure

aois.name: Isaan cassava / sugar belt
aois.measures: Planted area + harvest cycle → sugar / cassava output

aois.name: Utility-scale solar sites
aois.measures: New PV-array footprint → renewable capacity additions
